text: The service and quality of work here are consistently outstanding. I’ve been bringing my cars here for years, and the team is always incredibly friendly and helpful. It’s rare to find a garage this reliable—I can’t recommend them highly enough!

Fantastic garage - Mick and guys run a great service. I recently took my (banger) car in, it failed the MOT and I really appreciated the honest feedback on next steps - they did not charge for the MOT either. I always find them to honest, value for money, with a 'can-do' and problem-solving attitude.
I take mine and my mums car to this garage. They dont rip you off and are very polite. Great garage, I would recommend anyone to take your car here 😀
